monthly_reports.summary: During January 2026, a total of 312 headlines were analyzed across 6 language services. BBC Swahili maintained the most positive outlook (+0.09 avg polarity), while BBC Russian showed the most negative sentiment (+0.03). Overall sentiment improved by 0.03 compared to the previous period.

monthly_reports.summary: During July 2026, a total of 100 headlines were analyzed across 10 language services. BBC Mundo maintained the most positive outlook (+0.20 avg polarity), while BBC Russian showed the most negative sentiment (-0.40). Overall sentiment improved by 0.03 compared to the previous period.
